name: fantasy
description: Medieval fantasy settings — ruins, temples, magic
setting_pool: A stone temple deep in the mountains
A cavern lit by phosphorescent moss
A hilltop shrine under a strange sky
A ruined city reclaimed by forest

background_pool.text: The crumbling stone architecture of {setting}, massive carved blocks toppled among strangling vines, moss and lichen softening every edge, shafts of light piercing the canopy above
The sacred interior of {setting}, vaulted ceilings disappearing into shadow, carved pillars covered in ancient script, dust motes drifting in shafts of light from high narrow windows
The vast echoing space of {setting}, clustered crystals emitting a faint glow, damp stone walls reflecting shimmering light, a sense of immense scale and ancient purpose
The exposed elevation of {setting}, wind-sculpted standing stones arranged in patterns, an alien sky churning with unnatural colors above, distant landscapes visible below
The overgrown remnants of {setting}, crumbling towers and broken colonnades rising through old-growth forest, roots splitting ancient stonework, birdsong and dappled green light
A close alcove within {setting}, intricate carvings and moss-covered stone pressing in from arm's reach, a single crack of daylight bisecting the darkness, moisture beading on cold surfaces
A narrow fissure in the rockface within {setting}, crystalline deposits glittering inches away, cold damp air, the close press of ancient stone etched with faded runes
The close detail of a carved threshold at {setting}, weathered relief sculptures depicting forgotten deities, lichen and mineral staining creating patinas of green and rust on the stonework
The pillared hall of {setting}, rows of stone columns receding into smoky darkness, shafts of daylight angling down from gaps in the vaulted ceiling, scattered rubble and fallen masonry
The terraced approach to {setting}, worn steps climbing between crumbling guardian statues, each twice the height of a person, the jungle pressing in from either side with vines and orchids

subject_pool: a weathered ranger in leather and cloak
an elven scholar with silver-bound tomes
a dwarven warrior in scarred plate armor
a hooded spellcaster trailing arcane mist
a knight in tarnished armor bearing a faded crest
a robed pilgrim with a carved staff
a tribal scout with ritual scarring and bone charms
a hedge witch gathering herbs into a leather pouch
an armored knight with a torn tabard
a rogue with bandaged hands and a short blade
a wizard with a crystal-topped staff
a ranger in a weathered green cloak
action_pool: kneeling to examine something on the ground
nocking an arrow to a bowstring
holding up a lantern to pierce the darkness
whispering an incantation, fingers trailing light
scanning the tree line, bow half-raised
binding a wound with a strip of cloth
